title: Rosave Rosave Lyrics Kuberan
stanzas:
Rosave rosave
en veettu rosave
naan paadum sangeetham
kaetkaamal thoongaathe

Rosave rosave
en veettu rosave
naan paadum sangeetham
kaetkaamal thoongaathe

Varugindra sogangal
nirandharam illaye
siragugal sari endraal
vaanam pakkamthaan

naettirundha megangal
indru vaanil kidayaadhu
indru vandha sogangal
naalai ennai thodaraadhu

Rosave rosave
en veettu rosave
naan paadum sangeetham
kaetkaamal thoongaathe

pani peitha neerile
malai moolgi pogumaa
kalangaamal vazhkiren
kaalam kaikoodum.

bayam kondu vaadinaal
payan yaedhum illaye
puyal pola maaruven
paasam en vedham

gopurathin kalasathil
etcham idum kaagangal
aana podhum saamikku
vandha dhillai kopangal

Rosave rosave
en veettu rosave
naan paadum sangeetham
kaetkaamal thoongaathe

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the song Rosave Rosave, the protagonist expresses deep affection and longing, reflecting on the beauty of love. The lyrics convey a sense of nostalgia and warmth, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. Set against the backdrop of the movie Kuberan, this melody evokes emotions of love and tenderness. The soothing composition by S.A. Rajkumar, paired with Unnikrishnan's captivating voice, creates an unforgettable listening experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Rosave Rosave from Kuberan is a melodious treat that captures the essence of love and nostalgia. With Unnikrishnan's soulful vocals and S.A. Rajkumar's enchanting composition, this song resonates deeply with listeners. Dive into the heartfelt lyrics and let the music transport you to a world of romance.
stanzaMeanings: Oh Rose, Rose, my home’s Rose, the music I sing should not let me sleep.
Like a breeze, I wander around, but I still face challenges.
During the sunny time, I become a shadow. If it rains, I will have an umbrella.
I will gather many names in the boat of the river.
Oh Rose, Rose, my home’s Rose, the music I sing should not let me sleep.
The sorrows that come are not constant; if wings are right, they will head towards the sky.
Those who have eaten from the beautiful rainbow have faith, and life becomes heaven.
Today, the clouds that have come from the north will not stay in the sky; the sorrows that have come today will not follow me tomorrow.
If you look at me, I will bloom; if I grow, I will bear fruit.
Oh Rose, Rose, my home’s Rose, the music I sing should not let me sleep.
Will the misty water flow away without fear? I live without worry, as time will come.
If fear comes, there is no use; I will change like a storm, love is my scripture.
In the pot of the temple, there is a place for the crows; it is enough for the Lord to come with anger.
Some flowers will come together and become the thread of my life.
Oh Rose, Rose, my home’s Rose, the music I sing should not let me sleep.
Like a breeze, I wander around, but I still face challenges.
During the sunny time, I become a shadow. If it rains, I will have an umbrella.
I will gather many names in the boat of the river.
